# BGReady

> BGReady is the all-in-one mobile and web app for Canadian background performers
> (film & TV "extras"). It helps people who work as background actors log their
> bookings, store their vouchers, calculate their pay under the UBCP/ACTRA rates,
> learn on-set terminology and etiquette, and build a casting profile that agencies
> and casting directors can see.

Official site: https://www.bgready.site

## What BGReady is
- A career toolkit for background actors / film extras in Canada (British Columbia and beyond).
- Free to start, with an optional paid membership for advanced features.
- Available as a web app and as an installable iOS/Android app (PWA + native).
- "BG" is on-set shorthand for "background" (background performers).

## Who it is for
- New and working background performers on film and television productions.
- People who want to become a film extra in Canada and need to learn the ropes.
- Talent agencies and casting directors who want to discover and book performers.

## Key features
- Work Log: record every booking, track earnings, and build a verifiable work history.
- Voucher Storage: photograph and keep every voucher attached to each booking.
- Rate Calculator: estimate exact pay with the official 2025-2028 UBCP/ACTRA rates built in.
- Film Set Glossary: an A-Z, searchable dictionary of film-set and background-acting terms.
- Scenario Simulator: practise real on-set situations before facing them.
- On-Set Journal: log people met and lessons learned, with photos.
- Film Contacts: a personal industry directory of directors, ADs, agents and performers.
- Proof of Residency: store documents and email them to production from your phone.
- Casting Profile & Availability Calendar: get seen by approved agencies and casting directors.
- Training Modules: film terminology, set etiquette, safety, and industry standards & pay.

## Contact
Website: https://www.bgready.site
Support: support@setready.site
